Phase-18.NAME: Deploy-Time AWG Stealth Obfuscation
Phase-18.goal: Implement AmneziaWG stealth obfuscation from the local AmnezWG reference so every fresh RU/DE deploy generates valid bounded obfuscation parameters for both the client-facing RU interface and the RU-to-DE relay tunnel. Backend-generated user, device, manual, raw config, and QR outputs must match the deployed RU awg0 profile.

non-goals.item-1: No automatic rotation of existing production clients without an explicit operator flag.
non-goals.item-2: No blind copy of the standalone firewall rules that would close KrotPN web, admin, or SSH surfaces.
non-goals.item-3: No floating build of AmneziaWG tools from unpinned upstream commits in production deploys.

Phase-18.step-1: Create AWGObfuscationProfile contract and helpers for generation, parsing, validation, and rendering. Ranges: H1-H4 100000000..2147483647, S1/S2 15..150, Jc 4..8, Jmin 40..50, Jmax 100..200.
Phase-18.step-2: Add deploy shell helper that creates CLIENT_PROFILE for external clients/RU awg0 and RELAY_PROFILE for RU awg-client/DE awg0. Fresh deploy generates both profiles; upgrade deploy preserves existing profiles unless STEALTH_ROTATE=1 is explicitly set.
Phase-18.step-3: Update deploy/deploy-on-server.sh and deploy/deploy-all.sh to install or build AmneziaWG userspace/tooling safely. Prefer pinned versions or checksums, disable stock wireguard only when compatible, and set WG_QUICK_USERSPACE_IMPLEMENTATION for managed services.
Phase-18.step-4: Render DE awg0.conf and RU awg-client.conf from RELAY_PROFILE and verify parity before starting either side. Preserve Full Tunnel policy routing and NAT introduced in Phase-17.
Phase-18.step-5: Render RU awg0.conf and backend .env AWG_CLIENT_* values from CLIENT_PROFILE. Fresh deploy may default VPN_PORT to 443/udp; upgrades preserve the previous port unless explicitly changed.
Phase-18.step-6: Add backend settings validation for CLIENT_PROFILE values and fallback parsing from /etc/amnezia/amneziawg/awg0.conf when env is absent. Settings must never log private keys, preshared keys, or full profile dumps.
Phase-18.step-7: Add nullable encrypted VPNClient.preshared_key_enc and Alembic migration. Existing clients stay valid with NULL PSK; newly provisioned or rotated clients receive PSK.
Phase-18.step-8: Update provisioning, manual CLI, config download, and QR flows to include CLIENT_PROFILE plus PresharedKey for new/rotated clients. All outputs must share one rendering path to prevent QR/raw/manual divergence.
Phase-18.step-9: Adapt kernel/firewall performance hardening from the reference: BBR/fq, safe UDP buffer tuning, qdisc, and AWG UDP NOTRACK. Rules must be additive/idempotent and must not block HTTPS, admin, backend health, or SSH.
Phase-18.step-10: Run deterministic tests, static deploy checks, and live rollout gates: profile parity, RU-DE handshake, new client handshake, DE egress, upgrade preservation, explicit rotation behavior.

data-flows.DF-AWG-001: deploy helper generates CLIENT_PROFILE and RELAY_PROFILE -> writes RU/DE AWG configs -> writes backend .env -> services start -> parity checks pass.
data-flows.DF-AWG-002: user/device/manual provisioning -> backend loads CLIENT_PROFILE -> generates keypair and PSK -> adds RU awg0 peer -> renders raw config and QR.
data-flows.DF-AWG-003: deploy detects existing awg0/awg-client profiles -> preserves values and VPN port -> backend env stays compatible -> existing clients keep working.

execution-status.local-implemented: M-030 profile helpers, deploy helper sourcing/copying, CLIENT_PROFILE and RELAY_PROFILE rendering, backend CLIENT_PROFILE loading with awg0.conf fallback, nullable encrypted VPNClient preshared keys, provisioning/reprovisioning PSK generation, config download PSK rendering, and deploy static checks.
execution-status.local-blockers: Exact docker compose config still requires deploy-generated .env with DB_PASSWORD. Exact pytest without -o addopts='' still requires pytest-cov in the local .venv because backend/pyproject.toml injects --cov options globally.
execution-status.published-rc: Commit 2d742a8fc190a8077c6b0dfbd35818c11cec899d was pushed to origin/main, so fresh VPS deploys from github.com/anyagixx/KrotPN.git will include Phase-18 AWG stealth obfuscation code.
execution-status.live-verification: Operator confirmed on 2026-04-19 that GitHub-main deploy of v2.11.0-awg-obfuscation-rc1 completed successfully and all Phase-18 live gates were checked: RU/DE rollout, CLIENT_PROFILE parity, RELAY_PROFILE parity, RU-DE handshake, new client handshake with obfuscation and PresharedKey, DE egress, and upgrade preservation without STEALTH_ROTATE.
execution-status.rotation-note: STEALTH_ROTATE=1 remains intentionally operator-only and should be tested only as an explicit rotation scenario because it requires reissuing client configs.

phase-gates.gate-1: Static grep finds no hardcoded production obfuscation values like Jc=120/Jmax=1000 in generated deploy config templates.
phase-gates.gate-2: CLIENT_PROFILE in backend settings exactly matches RU awg0.conf.
phase-gates.gate-3: RELAY_PROFILE exactly matches RU awg-client.conf and DE awg0.conf.
phase-gates.gate-4: Newly provisioned client config contains Jc/Jmin/Jmax/S1/S2/H1-H4 and PresharedKey and handshakes with RU awg0.
phase-gates.gate-5: RU-DE tunnel handshakes and client traffic exits through DE under Full Tunnel policy routing.
phase-gates.gate-6: Upgrade deploy without STEALTH_ROTATE preserves existing profile and port.

risk-assessment.risk-1: Changing obfuscation or UDP port invalidates existing client configs unless rotation is explicit.
risk-assessment.risk-2: RU and DE relay profiles must be identical across both tunnel endpoints or RU-DE connectivity fails.
risk-assessment.risk-3: Preshared-key migration must be nullable to avoid breaking legacy peers.
risk-assessment.risk-4: Standalone stealth firewall rules must be adapted because RU also hosts web, admin, nginx, Docker, and SSH surfaces.
risk-assessment.risk-5: Building AmneziaWG from unpinned upstream sources at deploy time creates supply-chain and reproducibility risk.
